hero.title: Engineering Talent & Digital Solutions for Modern Companies
hero.subtitle: EngiMatch LLC connects companies with highly skilled technical talent and delivers professional digital solutions to strengthen corporate presence across the United States.

success.title: Hard-to-Fill Role. Under 3 Weeks.
success.subtitle: A real case that shows what precision recruitment looks like.
success.solutionText: We sourced and validated qualified international talent aligned with their technical and cultural requirements — ensuring a seamless hire that kept their project on schedule.
success.quote: There's great talent out there. You just need the right partner to find it.

about.title: Technical Expertise Operational
about.body: We are a binational company specializing in technical staffing, industrial operations, and corporate digital solutions. Our team combines real manufacturing experience with professional web development to support companies that require structure, credibility, and measurable results.

services.title: Technical Staffing Services
services.titleHighlight: Technical Staffing for Manufacturing & Industrial Operations
services.titleRight: EngiMatch LLC provides specialized talent for:

digitalServices.title: Web Development & Corporate Digital Solutions
digitalServices.titleHighlight: Professional digital solutions for businesses that need corporate presence, structure, and credibility in the U.S. market.

services.title: Landing pages for businesses and startups
Digital consulting for new U.S. businesses

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A streamlined, transparent process designed to get the right engineer on your team — fast.

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.desc: Share your technical requirements, team culture, and hiring timeline. The more detail, the better we match.

steps.title: We Source & Validate
steps.desc: We identify and rigorously screen international engineering talent — technical skills, English proficiency, and TN visa eligibility.

steps.title: Review Top Candidates
steps.desc: You receive a curated shortlist of pre-vetted engineers — no noise, just quality fits for your role.

steps.title: We Handle the Process
steps.desc: We support you through interviews, offer negotiations, and TN visa coordination from start to finish.

steps.title: Successful Placement
steps.desc: Your team grows with the right talent, on time and on budget — with our commitment to long-term success.
